title: Outlines [Contours]
description: Add subtle outlines -[like BSL] without shaderloaders! [coreshaders]
body:
![title_top](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/abf1caecf3bacd64233f5a3a0a37568ed5ed7367.png)

![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52db3217987b338a2007fed56d8245b681775223.png)

![title_bottom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f190ae6e8110212d251ae305d74e5c05e8ec15d2.png)

   ## Faint White Edge Highlights Without ShaderLoaders!

_A pack by Rusty_Pie_ 

![divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b2b1070f825fdfff217a26b501ae292b7476821.png)

* This pack adds subtle, pale white outlines around objects
* just like **BSL's Outlines** _but_ without any mods or shaders.

* works in vanilla Minecraft 1.21.5
* using depth-based edge detection.

![divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b2b1070f825fdfff217a26b501ae292b7476821.png)
## **What It Does**


* The pack works on CoreShaders
* It uses DepthMaps to find edges

* Its a Close Recreation of BSL's Outline effect

![divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b2b1070f825fdfff217a26b501ae292b7476821.png)

## **Screenshots**
![screenshots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba151b491a09cd2b2369608d99212b1570d85aae_0.webp)
#

![divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b2b1070f825fdfff217a26b501ae292b7476821.png)

# How to Use


> You can simply enable it as ResourcePack (Copy the .zip into the Resourcepack directory).
> If you are using Sodium or Iris, the Sodium Core Shader Support mod is required.

* This pack is incompatible with Optifine!

* Requires Fabulous Graphics mode in your Video Settings to work.

* Only Works on 1.21.5+
  
  * May not work on older versions.[​due to 1.21.5's coreshader changes]



<details>
<summary>For Sodium Compat </summary>
  
You MUST install the
[Sodium Core Shader Support Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-core-shader-support)
  
</details>

![divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b2b1070f825fdfff217a26b501ae292b7476821.png)
